name: godot-core
description: Research-grounded Codex workflows for Godot 4.6 engineering, Web delivery, and WeChat/Douyin mini-game adaptation.

interface.shortDescription: Godot 4.6 workflows for implementation, Web, and mini-game adaptation
interface.longDescription: Research-grounded Codex skills for bug triage, feature delivery, scene-safe refactors, export workflows, Web shipping constraints, Web CJK font repair, and WeChat/Douyin mini-game adaptation.
defaultPrompt: Use Godot Core to diagnose this Godot runtime error and propose a minimal fix.
Use Godot Core to prepare this Godot Web export and call out platform-specific risks.
Use Godot Core to repair CJK glyph failures in this Godot Web build and state the validation steps.
Use Godot Core to adapt this Godot project for WeChat and Douyin mini-game export and list the validation gates.
